steps.title: Identify the key ranking for project leaders
steps.content: The city planner concludes that advertisements to project leaders should emphasize pollination. This conclusion only makes sense if pollination is what project leaders value most—that is, if the data shows pollination ranked highest among their priorities.

steps.title: Check which comparison supports this targeting
steps.content:
Choice C — The enhancement of pollination was ranked higher for project leaders than were the other four services. states that enhancement of pollination is ranked 1 for project leaders, higher than conservation of genetic variability (5), urban aesthetics (8), soil erosion (13), and social cohesion (17).

The other three choices either make cross-group comparisons unrelated to the planner's strategy or contradict the data.

That matches Choice C — The enhancement of pollination was ranked higher for project leaders than were the other four services..
